title: Glassy-Jelly Smoky Japanese Pistachio Nigiri
description: Smoky, glassy-jelly, adventurous Japanese dish featuring unsalted pistachio, nigiri-shaping, jain-friendly. The combination of flavors and textures creates a unique culinary experience.

ingredients.name: Glassy-jelly cube (made from agar agar and sugar)

instructions: Mix pistachio paste with sesame oil in a small bowl until well combined.
Add matcha powder and smoked salt-free seasoning to the bowl and mix until a smooth paste forms.
In a separate bowl, mix together glassy-jelly cube, sesame seeds, and rice vinegar.
Add the mixture to the bowl with the pistachio paste and mix until well combined.
Gradually add water to the bowl, mixing until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable and easy to shape.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a small ball.
Using your hands, flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Place a small amount of unsalted rice vinegar on the surface of each disk.
Top each disk with a small amount of the pistachio paste mixture and fold the disk in half to form a nigiri shape.
